stability_notes: Dominant channels/triggers computed over all extracted events (research + Frank transcript). Interpretive claims are separated via `raw_vs_claim`.

museumization_overlays.description: Ritual/crowd density as an overlay shaping subjective intensity (synchronization, noise/heat load, expectation).
museumization_overlays.notes: Confounder: collective dynamics can be mistaken for place-intrinsic signature; treat as contextual overlay.
